description: preview a batch of TTS request payloads from a JSONL file (dry-run; no audio rendered without OPENAI_API_KEY + network)
rules: runs the bundled CLI in --dry-run (deterministic, offline; no openai package needed)
one job per JSONL line; per-job overrides supported (model, voice, response_format, speed, instructions, out)
each job input must be <= 4096 characters; rpm capped at 50
live audio rendering requires OPENAI_API_KEY + network and is performed outside the governed run
batch request payloads written to record_store
usage: Set JOBS_JSONL (path to a JSONL file, one job per line). Output: batch.json.
limitation: Governed run is dry-run only: it materializes the per-job request payloads, it does not call the API or write audio.
